title: ribes cereum var. inebrians
intro: Ribes cereum var. inebrians, also known as the drinkeberry or stink currant, is a shrub native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ribes cereum var. inebrians include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is often used to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
